examples: Listenership drops steadily from this peak, crossing the line for television views at around 2pm.
However, the network did suffer a fall in overall listenership dropping 12.4% on the quarter.
However, 5 live itself saw listenership slip during the three-month period, by 38, 000.
The latest is the new batch of ratings figures from Arbitron, which show listenership plummeting for some of the biggest names in radio.
